channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Anthropic] How we contain Claude across products
item.description: How we contain Claude across products

item.title: [Hacker News] Uber, Lyft drivers in Massachusetts form first US ride-share union
item.description: Uber, Lyft drivers in Massachusetts form first US ride-share union

item.title: [Interconnects] Some ideas for what comes next, May 2026
item.description: Some ideas for what comes next, May 2026

item.title: [Simon Willison] Microsoft Copilot Cowork Exfiltrates Files
item.description: Microsoft Copilot Cowork Exfiltrates Files

item.title: [Hacker News] Language Models Need Sleep
item.description: Language Models Need Sleep

item.title: [Hacker News] Spain blocks prediction markets Polymarket, Kalshi over lack of gambling licence
item.description: Spain blocks prediction markets Polymarket, Kalshi over lack of gambling licence

item.title: [Hacker News] Outsourcing plus LocalAI will soon become more economical vs. Frontier labs
item.description: Outsourcing plus LocalAI will soon become more economical vs. Frontier labs

item.title: [Hacker News] GitHub Actions down again today
item.description: GitHub Actions down again today

item.title: [GitHub Trending] DigitalPlatDev/FreeDomain — DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone
item.description: DigitalPlat FreeDomain is a GitHub project providing free domains to users.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] twentyhq/twenty — The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.
item.description: Twenty is an open-source CRM platform designed as a Salesforce alternative with AI capabilities.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Open-Dev-Society/OpenStock — OpenStock is an open-source alternative to expensive market platforms. Track real-time prices, set personalized alerts, and explore detailed company insights — built openly, for everyone, forever free.
item.description: OpenStock is a free open-source market tracking platform with real-time pricing, alerts, and company data.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/thedotmack — Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More
item.description: Tool captures and compresses agent session context, then reinjects it into future sessions across multiple AI platforms.

item.title: [Hacker News] Uber president says AI spending is getting 'harder to justify'
item.description: Uber president says AI spending is getting 'harder to justify'

item.title: [Hacker News] Ask HN: Is anyone working at least 4 hours daily on an Apple Vision Pro?
item.description: Ask HN: Is anyone working at least 4 hours daily on an Apple Vision Pro?

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Algometrics: Forecasting Under Algorithmic Feedback
item.description: Framework demonstrates that forecasting performance in algorithmic markets differs between passive historical evaluation and actual deployment with algorithm-driven actions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Parameter Efficient Multi-Class Intelligent Scheduling for Multimodal Online Distributed Industrial Anomaly Detection
item.description: Distributed framework for multimodal anomaly detection in industrial systems with efficient scheduling and parameter-efficient training strategies.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CAFD: Concept-Aware DNN Fault Detection using VLMs
item.description: CAFD efficiently detects DNN faults by leveraging Vision-Language Models to extract concepts and compute failure ratios.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards Verifiable Transformers: Solver-Checkable Circuit Explanations
item.description: Framework converts Transformer circuits into formally verifiable claims, using SMT solvers to prove circuit properties including functional equivalence and edge necessity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Iterative Refinement Neural Operators are Learned Fixed-Point Solvers: A Principled Approach to Spectral Bias Mitigation
item.description: Neural operators with learned iterative refinement reduce spectral bias through fixed-point iteration, achieving up to 56% error reduction on turbulent flow.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hidden-State Privacy Has an Empty Middle
item.description: Study reveals fundamental gap in hidden-state privacy: no Gaussian mechanism achieves both adequate privacy and utility against adaptive attackers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM-AutoSciLab: Closed-Loop Scientific Discovery via Active Experimentation with LLMs
item.description: LLM-AutoSciLab iteratively generates hypotheses and selects informative experiments for scientific discovery, outperforming prior methods on enzyme kinetics and gene network benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark: Do Protein-Ligand Models Learn Binding Sites or Just Binding Likelihood?
item.description: New InteractBind dataset reveals protein-ligand models predict binding strength but fail to localize actual binding sites.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mixture of Complementary Agents for Robust LLM Ensemble
item.description: Study proposes selecting LLMs for ensembles based on complementarity with others, using efficient greedy algorithms to improve multi-agent collaboration performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Truthful Online Preference Aggregation for LLM Fine-Tuning in Mobile Crowdsourcing
item.description: Online aggregation mechanism ensures truthful worker feedback for LLM fine-tuning in mobile crowdsourcing with sublinear regret bounds against strategic misreporting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cascade-KDE: Robust Time-Series Restoration under Out-of-Distribution Impulse Corruptions
item.description: Cascade-KDE restores corrupted time series using density estimation while preserving critical features and derivative peaks without training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Feature Lottery? A Bifurcation Theory of Concept Emergence
item.description: Bifurcation theory predicts when neural networks acquire structured representations during training without labels, enabling real-time detection of representation phase transitions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Signs Beat Floats: Low-Rank Double-Binary Adaptation for On-Device Fine-Tuning
item.description: LoRDBA encodes LoRA adapters using binary signs and channel scales, achieving 10x size reduction while maintaining model quality and minimal latency impact.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectral Probe-Circuits: A Three-Step Recipe for Identifying Attention-Head Circuits in Pretrained Transformers
item.description: Method identifies causal attention-head circuits in transformers using spectral signals and ablation, validated across model architectures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Learning over Human-Body Communication for On-Body Edge Intelligence: A Survey, Taxonomy, and BODYFED-HBC Scheduling Vignette
item.description: Survey proposes BODYFED-HBC taxonomy and scheduling algorithms for federated learning over human-body communication in wearable networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generative Representation Learning on Hyper-relational Knowledge Graphs via Masked Discrete Diffusion
item.description: KREPE, a masked discrete diffusion method for hyper-relational knowledge graphs, generates complete facts from partially observed queries and unifies both link prediction and fact generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Not All Transitions Matter: Evidence from PPO
item.description: Dropping 25% of transitions in PPO training reduces gradient redundancy from causally-dependent states, improving stability without sacrificing reward.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Verified SHAP: Provable Bounds for Exact Shapley Values of Neural Networks
item.description: Algorithm leverages neural network verification to compute tight bounds on SHAP values for neural networks, scaling to larger search spaces than prior methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Overcoming "Physics Shock" in Earth Observation A Heteroscedastic Uncertainty Framework for PINN-based Flood Inference
item.description: Uncertainty-aware PINN framework addresses "Physics Shock" instability in flood extent mapping from satellite data, achieving 25% improvement over deterministic models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Riemannian Archetypal Analysis: Interpretable non-linear data analysis on deformed star distributions
item.description: Riemannian archetypal analysis extends classical archetypal analysis to handle non-linear data while preserving geometric interpretability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Knowledge Graph Modulated Deep Learning for Limited-Sample Clinical Data Analysis
item.description: Graph-in-Graph framework integrates biological knowledge graphs with patient-specific data for improved limited-sample clinical prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PromptAudit: Auditing Prompt Sensitivity in LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection
item.description: PromptAudit framework shows that LLM vulnerability detection reliability significantly varies by prompting strategy and model, with chain-of-thought performing best overall.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Filtered Posterior Mean Collections: A Unified Framework for Analytical Models of Diffusion Generalization
item.description: Researchers propose Filtered Posterior Mean Collections, a unified framework improving diffusion model denoising function generalization across datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Characterizing the Representational Capacity of Neural Processes
item.description: Neural Process variants form strict hierarchy: CNPs capture finite-dependent functions; ANPs generalize via query-dependent reweighting; TNPs handle multi-hop context interactions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agent-ToM: Learning to Monitor Autonomous LLM Agents via Theory-of-Mind Reasoning
item.description: Agent-ToM monitors autonomous LLM agents for covert malicious behavior using Theory-of-Mind reasoning to infer beliefs and detect behavioral deviations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PrivFusion: A Privacy-preserving Multi-Agent Framework for Harmonizing Distributed Datasets
item.description: PrivFusion automates harmonization of heterogeneous clinical datasets for privacy-preserving federated learning without centralized data aggregation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rethinking Continual Anomaly Detection on the Edge: Benchmarking Under Realistic Industrial Conditions
item.description: Benchmark for continual anomaly detection proposes DINOSaur, a training-free method achieving zero forgetting and sub-100ms inference on edge hardware.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Optimizing Digital Therapeutic Interventions: Online Learning under Endogenous Adherence
item.description: Researchers propose an online learning framework for digital therapeutics that models endogenous relationships between treatment recommendations and patient adherence for chronic disease management.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A lift for input-convex neural network training
item.description: A hypernetwork-based method improves input-convex neural network training by generating constrained weights from batch summaries, avoiding gradient stalling of direct constraint approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fourier Feature Pyramids for Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description: Fourier feature pyramids improve physics-informed neural networks for solving PDEs through better accuracy and computational efficiency than current methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Document Classification Pattern Recognition via Information Fusion: A Systematic Review of Multimodal and Multiview Representation Approaches
item.description: Systematic review of 139 studies finds multimodal fusion improves document classification accuracy by 5.28 percentage points, though reproducibility issues persist.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Raon-Speech Technical Report
item.description: Raon-Speech, a 9B speech language model, achieves strong performance on English and Korean speech understanding, generation, and real-time conversation benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Multi-Persona Debate System for Automated Scientific Hypothesis Generation
item.description: Multi-Persona Debate System generates scientific hypotheses through literature-grounded multi-agent debate for battery materials research.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Improving the Completeness and Comparability of Segment Disclosures: A Large Language Model Approach
item.description: LLM framework improves financial segment disclosure extraction from SEC filings by preserving nested segments and enabling cross-firm comparability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EchoDistill:Alignment Noisy-to-Clean Self-Distillation for Robust Audio LLMs
item.description: EchoDistill improves Audio LLM robustness to noise using clean-audio teacher supervision and policy optimization without inference overhead.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TriVAL: A Tri-Validation Framework for Faithful Automatic Optimization Modeling
item.description: TriVAL introduces a three-stage validation framework for automatic optimization modeling, reducing error propagation through semantic specification, mathematical formulation, and code generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SLAP: Stratified Loss-based Pruning for On-Policy Data-Efficient Instruction Tuning
item.description: SLAP enables efficient LLM instruction tuning via batch-aware data selection, maintaining performance with 20-40% less training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Faithful or Fabricated? A Causal Framework for Rationalization Bias in LLM Judges
item.description: LLM judges show explanation bias anchored to non-evidential cues; PROOF-BEFORE-PREFERENCE improves cue-invariance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AERIC: Anticipatory Hidden-State Monitoring for Implicit Harmful Dialogue
item.description: AERIC detects implicit harmful dialogue by monitoring language model hidden states during generation, using only 387 trainable parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Direct Preference Optimization for English-Mandarin Code-Switching Speech Recognition in Audio LLMs
item.description: Direct Preference Optimization successfully aligns Audio LLMs to transcribe English-Mandarin code-switching speech, achieving up to 89.6% error reduction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Multi-Probe Audit of Clinical-Interview Depression Detection Benchmarks
item.description: Multi-probe audit reveals clinical depression detection benchmarks have unreliable rankings and poor zero-shot generalization across datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Toxicity in Twitch Chats: An LLM-Based Analysis Across Gaming Communities
item.description: LLM-based analysis of 20 million Twitch messages finds 2.4% toxicity with variations across game genres, highest in MOBA games and lowest in sports.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CUNY at CLPsych 2026: A Pipeline Approach to Classification and Summarization of Mental Health Changes
item.description: Ensemble of open-weight LLMs and supervised classifiers achieved top rankings on CLPsych 2026 mental health detection tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Extracting Training Data from Diffusion Language Models via Infilling
item.description: Diffusion language models leak up to three times more training data than autoregressive models when extraction targets arbitrary masked token positions rather than just prefixes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Teaching Through Analogies: A Modular Pipeline for Educational Analogy Generation
item.description: Four-stage modular pipeline decomposes educational analogy generation; sub-concepts improve explanation quality and retrieval precision.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] QUEST: Training Frontier Deep Research Agents with Fully Synthetic Tasks
item.description: QUEST releases open-source deep research agent models (2B-35B) trained on 8K synthetic tasks, matching proprietary frontier systems.
